mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

mentions_legales.label: Forme juridique
mentions_legales.quote: Anthropic PBC with a registered address at 548 Market St, PMB 90375, San Francisco, CA 94104 (United States).

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de l'établissement / siège social
mentions_legales.quote: 548 Market St, PMB 90375, San Francisco, CA 94104 (United States)

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de courrier électronique
mentions_legales.quote: You can email us at privacy@anthropic.com and contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@anthropic.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and process your personal data when you use our website, Claude.ai, or other Anthropic products and services (the "Services").

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you live in the European Economic Area (EEA), UK or Switzerland (the "European Region"), the data controller responsible for your personal data is Anthropic Ireland, Limited. If you live outside the European Region, the data controller responsible for your personal data is Anthropic PBC.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You can email us at privacy@anthropic.com and contact our Data Protection Officer at dpo@anthropic.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - Identity and Contact Data: Anthropic collects identifiers, including your name, email address, and phone number when you sign up for an Anthropic account, or to receive information on our Services. We may also collect or generate indirect identifiers (e.g., "USER12345").

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Purpose | Type of Data | Legal Basis |
|---|---|---|
| To provide, maintain and facilitate any products and services offered to you with respect to your Anthropic account, which are governed by our Terms of Service | Identity and Contact DataPayment InformationFeedbackInputs and OutputsTechnical Information
 | Contract |

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: When you provide Inputs—including by uploading files, granting Claude access to third-party services, or instructing Claude to retrieve or act on information—you are responsible for ensuring you have the necessary rights, permissions, or authority to do so.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Anthropic retains your personal data for as long as reasonably necessary for the purposes and criteria outlined in this Privacy Policy and explained further in our privacy center.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
Anthropic will disclose personal data to, or receive personal data from, the following categories of third parties for the purposes explained in this Policy:

- Affiliates & corporate partners: Anthropic discloses the categories of personal data described above between and among its affiliates and related entities.
- Service providers & business partners: Anthropic may receive and disclose the categories of personal data described above with service providers and business partners for a variety of business purposes, including website and data hosting, ensuring compliance with industry standards, research, auditing, data processing, investigating and resolving safety and security issues, preventing and investigating fraud, abuse, and violations of our Usage Policy, and providing you with the Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Anthropic does not engage in decision making based solely on automated processing or profiling in a manner which produces a legal effect (i.e., impacts your legal rights) or significantly affects you in a similar way (e.g., significantly affects your financial circumstances or ability to access essential goods or services).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures designed to protect personal data from loss, misuse, and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
Anthropic obtains personal data from third party sources in order to train our models. Specifically, we train our models using data from the following sources:

- Publicly available information via the Internet
- Datasets that we obtain through commercial agreements with third party businesses
- Data that our users or crowd workers provide, including Inputs and Outputs from our Services (unless users opt out)
- Feedback that users explicitly provide about our Services
- Materials flagged for safety, security, or policy review
- Data that we generate internally

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
- Publicly available information via the Internet
- Datasets that we obtain through commercial agreements with third party businesses

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Please note that under many countries' laws, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority in the place in which you live or work.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - Correction: the right to request that we correct inaccurate personal data Anthropic retains about you, subject to certain exceptions.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - Access & data portability: the right to request a copy of the personal data Anthropic processes about you, subject to certain exceptions and conditions.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - Deletion: the right to request that we delete personal data collected from you when you use our Services, subject to certain exceptions.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - Restriction: the right to restrict our processing of your personal data in certain circumstances.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - Access & data portability: the right to request a copy of the personal data Anthropic processes about you, subject to certain exceptions and conditions. In certain cases and subject to applicable law, you have the right to port your information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - Objection: the right to object to processing of your personal data, including profiling conducted on grounds of public or legitimate interest.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: For more details about how we use these technologies, and your opt-out controls and other options, please visit our Cookie Policy.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote: If you live in the European Economic Area (EEA), UK or Switzerland (the "European Region"), the data controller responsible for your personal data is Anthropic Ireland, Limited.

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: These technologies help us to recognize you, customize or personalize your experience, market additional products or services to you, and analyze the use of our Services to make them safer and more useful to you.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Anthropic is a global company, and when you access our Services, your personal data is transferred to our servers in the US, or to other countries outside the European Economic Area (“EEA”) and the UK for the purposes outlined in Section 2 of this Privacy Policy, for example to provide you with the Service, or to train our models, or to conduct research.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
transferts_hors_ue.quote: Anthropic is a global company, and when you access our Services, your personal data is transferred to our servers in the US, or to other countries outside the European Economic Area (“EEA”) and the UK for the purposes outlined in Section 2 of this Privacy Policy, for example to provide you with the Service, or to train our models, or to conduct research.

identite.quote: Anthropic collects identifiers, including your name, email address, and phone number when you sign up for an Anthropic account, or to receive information on our Services. We may also collect or generate indirect identifiers (e.g., “USER12345”).
identite.purpose: Création et administration du compte utilisateur, communication et vérification d'identité.

contact.quote: Anthropic collects identifiers, including your name, email address, and phone number when you sign up for an Anthropic account, or to receive information on our Services.
contact.purpose: Communication avec l'utilisateur, gestion du compte et envoi d'informations sur les services.

compte_auth.quote: If you include personal data or reference external content in your Inputs, we will collect that information and it may be reproduced in your Outputs. Depending on the permissions you grant Claude, some Outputs may result in actions with effects outside the Services, such as sending communications, modifying files, or interacting with third-party services on your behalf.
compte_auth.purpose: Authentification, gestion des sessions utilisateur et exécution des actions demandées via le service.

paiement.quote: We shall collect your payment information if you choose to purchase access to Anthropic’s Services.
paiement.purpose: Traitement des paiements pour les services souscrits.

localisation.quote: This includes information such as [...] IP address (including information about the location of the device derived from your IP address), identifiers (including device or advertising identifiers, probabilistic identifiers, and other unique personal or online identifiers), and device location.
localisation.purpose: Personnalisation de l'expérience utilisateur, analyse technique et sécurité.

appareil_technique.quote: Device and Connection Information: Consistent with your device or browser permissions, your device or browser automatically sends us information about when and how you install, access, or use our Services. This includes information such as your device type, operating system information, browser information and web page referers, mobile network, connection information, mobile operator or internet service provider (ISP), time zone setting, IP address [...] identifiers (including device or advertising identifiers, probabilistic identifiers, and other unique personal or online identifiers).
appareil_technique.purpose: Fonctionnement technique du service, personnalisation et analyse d'usage.

usage_comportement.quote: Usage Information: We collect information about your use of the Services, such as the dates and times of access, browsing history, search, information about the links you click and about third-party applications, services, and content you integrate or interact with, pages you view, and other information about how you use the Services, and technology on the devices you use to access the Services.
usage_comportement.purpose: Amélioration du service, analyse du comportement utilisateur et personnalisation.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: The content you submit to the Services through these interactions, including via third-party applications, services, and content you choose to upload, integrate or interact with using our Services, are your “Inputs”. Inputs generate responses and actions (“Outputs”).
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Fourniture du service, génération de réponses et amélioration des modèles d'IA.

communications.quote: Communication Information: If you communicate with us, including via our chatbot on our Help site, we collect your name, contact information, and the contents of any messages you send.
communications.purpose: Gestion des communications avec l'utilisateur et support technique.

donnees_tiers.quote: Anthropic obtains personal data from third party sources in order to train our models. Specifically, we train our models using data from the following sources: Publicly available information via the Internet Datasets that we obtain through commercial agreements with third party businesses Data that our users or crowd workers provide, including Inputs and Outputs from our Services (unless users opt out) Feedback that users explicitly provide about our Services Materials flagged for safety, security, or policy review Data that we generate internally
donnees_tiers.purpose: Entraînement et amélioration des modèles d'IA.

biometrie.quote: Verification Data: [...] your image in photo or video form, facial geometry templates (which may be considered ‘biometric data’ in some jurisdictions);

mineurs.quote: Our Services are not directed towards, and we do not knowingly collect, use, disclose, sell, or share any information from children under the age of 18.
